project_context: Sanitized interview fixture for no-model BiteBuilder smoke testing.
goal: Build a concise proof-of-concept cut about trust and handoff clarity.

options.name: Tonight Proof Cut
options.description: A tiny deterministic sequence that proves XMEML rendering without a live model.

bites.speaker: Speaker 1
bites.text: The real challenge is not speed, it is trust in the first draft.

bites.speaker: Speaker 2
bites.text: When the handoff is clear, the editor can make a decision in minutes.
